description: Celebrate Black History Month by uplifting local talents with this engaging newsletter. This template is perfect for non-profit organizations aiming to honor Black History Month while promoting culture and supporting small businesses. Highlighting the importance of seasonal community engagement, this email layout is designed to spotlight local artists in your community. Encourage recipients to contribute or participate in local events, purchase art, or donate to causes that support these artists. This template serves as a reminder of the rich cultural heritage in our midst, and the importance of supporting local businesses, especially during Black History Month.
short_description: Promote local talent this Black History Month with our engaging newsletter template. Perfect for non-profits, celebrate culture, support small businesses, and encourage community participation. Honor rich cultural heritage and uplift local artists.

designer.description: Hi, I'm Betina, a digital designer currently working across emails, digital campaigns and social media.
